default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly checkpoint to discuss high-value automation opportunities and share insights on AI-driven workflows at DeepGram.](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on revenue-driving, externally-facing automations (e.g., post-call follow-up emails)](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Implement knowledge base storage for efficient data reuse and retrieval](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Prioritize building a follow-up email generator for sales, starting with manual inputs and progressing to full automation](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Collaborate on creating variables and config steps for more maintainable and flexible prompts](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=3074.0)

## Topics

### Automation Goals and Focus Areas

  - [Brain trust for high-value, complex automations and enablements](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Showcase DeepGram's API capabilities through internal use](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Share insights from external companies (19+ customers, including Reddit, Ramp)](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Promote DeepGram as an AI-native company](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Identify weekly automation targets for collaborative development](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)

### External Insights and Cultural Shift

  - [High demand for transcription-based tools and customized AI assistants](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Need for a cultural shift towards "automation-first" mindset](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Importance of measuring impact beyond ROI, focusing on cultural change and momentum](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)

### Data Management and Accessibility

  - [Implement "no data left behind" policy for complete data backup](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Centralize data storage for easier access and reduced system integrations](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Balance data democratization with responsible governance and safeguards](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)

### Workflow Optimization and Knowledge Base Integration

  - [Store workflow outputs in vector databases for efficient reuse](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)
  - [Create knowledge bases for each workflow to reduce redundant processing](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=2421.0)
  - [Transition from complex workflows to modular, knowledge base-driven processes](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=2457.0)

### Follow-up Email Generator Project

  - [Utilize existing persona generation and call processing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=2169.0)
  - [Manually input data initially, then integrate with live pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [Collaborate on prompt variables and config steps for maintainability](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=3074.0)
  - [Test prototype with one AE before full rollout](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=2879.0)

### Slack Integration for Automated Notifications

  - [Explore options for direct messaging or channel notifications](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=2934.0)
  - [Utilize app mentions for targeted user notifications](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to build initial follow-up email generator workflow](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=3032.0)
  - [Sam to provide sample AE follow-up emails and identify early adopter](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=3043.0)
  - [Bill and Sam to assist with data retrieval and workflow triggers once initial prototype is ready](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=3216.0)
  - [Team to continue collaboration in the automation Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=3189.0)
  - [Review and prioritize other low-hanging fruit automation opportunities from Asana board](https://fathom.video/share/qaT8CLF6NxLLaEdgjjNoPreRNQcHGPr5?tab=summary&timestamp=3400.0)

action_items.description: Build first draft of follow-up email generator workflow using outputs from existing persona/call summary steps
Get sample good follow-up emails from AEs; identify early adopter AE for email generator testing
Set up cadence for automation checkpoint meetings; coordinate offline with participants
